plugin.name: Zettel Graph View
plugin.description: Obsidian-style graph view of your NotePlan vault, with note-backed saved views you can favorite in the sidebar.
plugin.author: Marginal Reader

plugin.commands.name: zettel graph view
plugin.commands.description: Open the Zettel Graph View panel

plugin.commands.name: zettel graph view: load view
plugin.commands.description: Load a saved Zettel Graph View (used by 'Load this view' callback links)

plugin.commands.name: zettel graph view: save view
plugin.commands.description: Save the current Zettel Graph View as a note

plugin.commands.name: zettel graph view: refresh
plugin.commands.description: Force a full rescan and redraw of the graph

plugin.commands.name: graphHTMLMessage
plugin.commands.description: Internal: routes messages from the HTMLView panel to plugin handlers

plugin.settings.title: Include Calendar Notes
plugin.settings.description: Show daily/weekly/monthly notes as graph nodes. Off by default — calendar notes can make the graph noisy.

plugin.settings.title: Excluded Folders
plugin.settings.description: Folders never scanned. Comma-separated, no leading slash.

plugin.settings.title: Saved Views Folder
plugin.settings.description: Folder where saved-view notes are stored.

plugin.settings.title: Outline Export Folder (default)
plugin.settings.description: Preferred folder for 'Export outline'. Pinned to the top of the folder picker as the default; you can still pick any other folder each time.

plugin.settings.title: Default Charge Strength
plugin.settings.description: D3 charge force strength (negative for repulsion).

plugin.settings.title: Label Zoom Threshold
plugin.settings.description: Show node labels only when zoom level >= this value. Set to 0 to always show; the default of 1.0 shows labels at default zoom and hides them when you zoom far out.
